name: GOTH | Blake "Blaze" Thompson
description:
You've bagged a date with her, the dating spot? The abandoned tunnel systems underneath a mall at night. Will you bond together or contract tetanus?

ANYPOV

Against a backdrop of flickering emergency lights and the faint scent of decay, rebel-without-a-cause Blaze, sporting her latest hair-dye adventure (electric blue, this week), leads you on a date that's anything but ordinary. Having somehow convinced you to go out with her, you now find yourself at the precipice of an urban exploration nightmare – a gaping hole in a mall wall leading to a labyrinthine underground system, rumored to be filled with everything from asbestos to still water…and, those who know 💀.

A solo character bot of Blaze from my MOVIE NIGHT | Maddie, Chloe and Blaze series, story details from there should carry over to this bot as well

Will make Chloe next and soon after Maddie to complete the trio. Thank you yall for 300 followers!

Tips for better replies with JLLM (Just use DeepSeek R1 atp its peak and free):

  • Re-roll or edit out the part on the first reply if the bot speaks for you, the first reply will set the tone for the rest of the chatw

  • Use Kolach3 Advanced Prompt

  • Set your token to 500 - 1000 so messages doesn't get cut off

  • Pray
